chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 361 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 3279/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on MA 3280/2023 4.For hearing of main case. 5.For orders on MA 3281/2023 09-06-2023 Ch. Shahid Hussain Rajput Advocate for the applicants. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-5. Farman Ali (respondent No.2) is present in person and files no objection affidavit, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that the applicants and respondent No.2 have reached the settlement and that the respondent No.2 does not longer want to register any FIR against the applicants-Mari Petroleum Company Daharki-Ghotki. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application stands disposed of accordingly along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
